testcase.name: Merchant Product Edit - Add Color Functionality › should investigate and fix Add Color button functionality

failure.message: merchant-add-color-functionality.spec.js:28:5 should investigate and fix Add Color button functionality

testcase.failure:
[chromium] › merchant-add-color-functionality.spec.js:28:5 › Merchant Product Edit - Add Color Functionality › should investigate and fix Add Color button functionality
TimeoutError: page.fill: Timeout 30000ms exceeded. Call log: - waiting for locator('input[name="email"]')
34 | if (currentUrl.includes('/login')) { 35 | // Fill login form - we'll need to use test credentials > 36 | await page.fill('input[name="email"]', 'merchant@test.com'); // Replace with actual test merchant email | ^ 37 | await page.fill('input[name="password"]', 'password'); // Replace with actual test password 38 | await page.click('button[type="submit"]'); 39 | await page.waitForLoadState('networkidle'); at C:\Users\Admin\Desktop\TheProject\Production\theproject_backend\tests\playwright\merchant-add-color-functionality.spec.js:36:24

Error Context: ..\..\test-results\merchant-add-color-functio-13cbe--Color-button-functionality-chromium\error-context.md
testcase.system-out:
❌ Console Error: Failed to load resource: the server responded with a status of 404 () 🔐 Attempting merchant login...

failure.message: merchant-new-color-first-size-fix.spec.js:53:5 should successfully add first size to new color variant and refresh UI

testcase.failure:
[chromium] › merchant-new-color-first-size-fix.spec.js:53:5 › Size Management UI Refresh Fix › should successfully add first size to new color variant and refresh UI

testcase.name: Merchant New Color Size Management Refresh Fix › should immediately show newly added size for a brand new color variant

failure.message: merchant-new-color-size-refresh-test.spec.js:51:5 should immediately show newly added size for a brand new color variant

testcase.failure:
[chromium] › merchant-new-color-size-refresh-test.spec.js:51:5 › Merchant New Color Size Management Refresh Fix › should immediately show newly added size for a brand new color variant
Error: page.click: Target page, context or browser has been closed Call log: - waiting for locator('button:has-text("Add Color")') - locator resolved to <button type="button" data-v-cae5635c="" class="vue-btn vue-btn-primary">…</button> - attempting click action 2 × waiting for element to be visible, enabled and stable - element is not visible - retrying click action - waiting 20ms 2 × waiting for element to be visible, enabled and stable - element is not visible - retrying click action - waiting 100ms 16 × waiting for element to be visible, enabled and stable - element is not visible - retrying click action - waiting 500ms
26 | 27 | // Add a basic color variant first (required for product creation) > 28 | await page.click('button:has-text("Add Color")'); | ^ 29 | await page.waitForTimeout(1000); 30 | 31 | // Fill color information at C:\Users\Admin\Desktop\TheProject\Production\theproject_backend\tests\playwright\merchant-new-color-size-refresh-test.spec.js:28:20
